option.value:
Project foundation

Recipe Recommender XML Java

Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, and XML structure are ready.

Setup check

The home page is working correctly and the project structure is in place.

Quick Navigation

View All Recipes View All Users Find By Cuisine Get Recommendations

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <recipes xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="recipes.xsd"> <recipe> <id>1</id> <title>Spaghetti Carbonara</title> <cuisineType1>Italian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Mediterranean</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>2</id> <title>Chicken Teriyaki Bowl</title> <cuisineType1>Asian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>3</id> <title>Beef Tacos</title> <cuisineType1>Mexican</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>4</id> <title>Chicken Tikka Masala</title> <cuisineType1>Indian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Asian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Advanced</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>5</id> <title>Romanian Cabbage Rolls</title> <cuisineType1>Romanian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Mediterranean</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>6</id> <title>Greek Chicken Salad</title> <cuisineType1>Mediterranean</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>7</id> <title>French Onion Soup</title> <cuisineType1>French</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>8</id> <title>Veggie Fried Rice</title> <cuisineType1>Asian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Mediterranean</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>9</id> <title>Margherita Pizza</title> <cuisineType1>Italian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>10</id> <title>Lentil Curry</title> <cuisineType1>Indian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Romanian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>11</id> <title>Fish Quesadillas</title> <cuisineType1>Mexican</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Mediterranean</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>12</id> <title>Roasted Vegetable Couscous</title> <cuisineType1>Mediterranean</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>French</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>13</id> <title>Beef Stir Fry</title> <cuisineType1>Asian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Italian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>14</id> <title>Chicken Parmesan</title> <cuisineType1>Italian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>French</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Advanced</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>15</id> <title>Turkey Burgers</title> <cuisineType1>American</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Romanian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>16</id> <title>Paneer Butter Masala</title> <cuisineType1>Indian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Asian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Advanced</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>17</id> <title>French Crepes</title> <cuisineType1>French</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Italian</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>18</id> <title>Chicken Burrito Bowl</title> <cuisineType1>Mexican</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Beginner</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>19</id> <title>Romanian Bean Stew</title> <cuisineType1>Romanian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>Mediterranean</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Intermediate</difficulty> </recipe> <recipe> <id>20</id> <title>Salmon Pasta Bake</title> <cuisineType1>Italian</cuisineType1> <cuisineType2>American</cuisineType2> <difficulty>Advanced</difficulty> </recipe> </recipes>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified">
<xs:simpleType name="cuisineType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Italian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Asian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Mexican"/> <xs:enumeration value="French"/> <xs:enumeration value="Romanian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Indian"/> <xs:enumeration value="American"/> <xs:enumeration value="Mediterranean"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<xs:simpleType name="difficultyType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Beginner"/> <xs:enumeration value="Intermediate"/> <xs:enumeration value="Advanced"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<xs:element name="recipes"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="recipe" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="1"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="title" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="cuisineType1" type="cuisineType"/> <xs:element name="cuisineType2" type="cuisineType"/> <xs:element name="difficulty" type="difficultyType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified">
<xs:simpleType name="cuisineType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Italian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Asian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Mexican"/> <xs:enumeration value="French"/> <xs:enumeration value="Romanian"/> <xs:enumeration value="Indian"/> <xs:enumeration value="American"/> <xs:enumeration value="Mediterranean"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<xs:simpleType name="skillLevelType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Beginner"/> <xs:enumeration value="Intermediate"/> <xs:enumeration value="Advanced"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<xs:element name="users"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="user" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="1"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="firstName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="lastName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="skillLevel" type="skillLevelType"/> <xs:element name="preferredCuisineType" type="cuisineType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>
